caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pointed wig and glasses sits in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, brown suspenders, and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and a "LEE" logo. The scene includes on-screen graphics: a logo on the left that says "TOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "TOSS TALK 101". As the video progresses, the man gestures with his hands while talking, moving his right arm and hand across his chest. In the final frame, he holds a small gold-colored object in his right hand while continuing to speak and gesture.
